mapper.select: SELECT id, email, password_hash, name, phone, role, oauth_provider, oauth_id, profile_image_file_id, profile_image_url, status, language, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM users WHERE email = #{email} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT id, email, password_hash, name, phone, role, oauth_provider, oauth_id, profile_image_file_id, profile_image_url, status, language, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM users WHERE email = #{email}

SELECT id, email, password_hash, name, phone, role, oauth_provider, oauth_id, profile_image_file_id, profile_image_url, status, language, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM users WHERE oauth_provider = #{oauthProvider} AND oauth_id = #{oauthId} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT id, email, password_hash, name, phone, role, oauth_provider, oauth_id, profile_image_file_id, profile_image_url, status, language, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM users WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT id, email, name, phone, role, oauth_provider, profile_image_file_id, profile_image_url, status, language, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM users WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND role = 'PERSONAL' ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC

SELECT u.id, u.email, u.name, u.phone, u.status, u.oauth_provider, u.profile_image_url, u.created_at, u.updated_at, login_stats.recent_login_at, pp.location, pp.career_years, pp.work_type, pp.is_public AS profile_public, COALESCE(resume_stats.resume_count, 0) AS resume_count, resume_stats.primary_resume_title, COALESCE(resume_stats.public_resume_count, 0) AS public_resume_count, resume_stats.latest_resume_updated_at, COALESCE(application_stats.application_count, 0) AS application_count, COALESCE(application_stats.reviewing_application_count, 0) AS reviewing_application_count, COALESCE(application_stats.accepted_application_count, 0) AS accepted_application_count, COALESCE(application_stats.rejected_application_count, 0) AS rejected_application_count, COALESCE(application_stats.canceled_application_count, 0) AS canceled_application_count, COALESCE(bookmark_stats.bookmark_count, 0) AS bookmark_count, COALESCE(offer_stats.offer_count, 0) AS offer_count, COALESCE(offer_stats.accepted_offer_count, 0) AS accepted_offer_count, COALESCE(offer_stats.declined_offer_count, 0) AS declined_offer_count, COALESCE(offer_stats.pending_offer_count, 0) AS pending_offer_count, 0 AS report_count, 0 AS sanction_count, memo_stats.admin_memo FROM users u LEFT JOIN personal_profiles pp ON pp.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ull.user_id, MAX(ull.created_at) AS recent_login_at FROM user_login_logs ull WHERE ull.success = TRUE GROUP BY ull.user_id ) login_stats ON login_stats.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT r.personal_profile_id, COUNT(*)::INT AS resume_count, MAX(CASE WHEN r.is_primary THEN r.title END) AS primary_resume_title, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE r.visibility IN ('PUBLIC', 'COMPANY_ONLY'))::INT AS public_resume_count, MAX(r.updated_at) AS latest_resume_updated_at FROM resumes r WHERE r.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY r.personal_profile_id ) resume_stats ON resume_stats.personal_profile_id = pp.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ja.user_id, COUNT(*)::INT AS application_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ja.status IN ('APPLIED', 'REVIEWING', 'INTERVIEW'))::INT AS reviewing_application_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ja.status = 'ACCEPTED')::INT AS accepted_application_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ja.status = 'REJECTED')::INT AS rejected_application_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ja.status = 'CANCELED')::INT AS canceled_application_count FROM job_applications ja GROUP BY ja.user_id ) application_stats ON application_stats.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT jb.user_id, COUNT(*)::INT AS bookmark_count FROM job_bookmarks jb GROUP BY jb.user_id ) bookmark_stats ON bookmark_stats.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT po.receiver_user_id, COUNT(*)::INT AS offer_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE po.status = 'ACCEPTED')::INT AS accepted_offer_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE po.status = 'DECLINED')::INT AS declined_offer_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE po.status = 'SENT')::INT AS pending_offer_count FROM position_offers po GROUP BY po.receiver_user_id ) offer_stats ON offer_stats.receiver_user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT aum.content AS admin_memo FROM admin_user_memos aum WHERE aum.user_id = u.id ORDER BY aum.created_at DESC, aum.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) memo_stats ON TRUE WHERE u.id = #{id} AND u.role = 'PERSONAL' AND u.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT u.id, cp.id AS company_profile_id, u.email, COALESCE(cp.company_name, u.name) AS name, u.phone, u.role, u.status, cp.company_name, cp.business_number, cp.industry, cp.verification_status, cp.logo_file_id, f.file_url AS logo_url, u.created_at, u.updated_at, u.deleted_at FROM users u LEFT JOIN company_profiles cp ON cp.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN files f ON f.id = cp.logo_file_id WHERE u.deleted_at IS NULL AND u.role = 'COMPANY' ORDER BY u.created_at DESC, u.id DESC

SELECT u.id, cp.id AS company_profile_id, u.email, COALESCE(cp.company_name, u.name) AS name, u.phone, u.status, u.created_at, u.updated_at, login_stats.recent_login_at, cp.company_name, cp.business_number, cp.verification_status, cp.website_url, f.file_url AS logo_url, cp.address, cp.description, cp.industry, cp.company_size, COALESCE(job_stats.job_count, 0) AS job_count, COALESCE(job_stats.open_job_count, 0) AS open_job_count, COALESCE(job_stats.closed_job_count, 0) AS closed_job_count, COALESCE(job_stats.hidden_job_count, 0) AS hidden_job_count, COALESCE(job_stats.draft_job_count, 0) AS draft_job_count, COALESCE(application_stats.applicant_count, 0) AS applicant_count, COALESCE(application_stats.unread_applicant_count, 0) AS unread_applicant_count, COALESCE(application_stats.progressing_application_count, 0) AS progressing_application_count, COALESCE(offer_stats.offer_count, 0) AS offer_count, COALESCE(offer_stats.accepted_offer_count, 0) AS accepted_offer_count, COALESCE(offer_stats.declined_offer_count, 0) AS declined_offer_count, COALESCE(offer_stats.pending_offer_count, 0) AS pending_offer_count, COALESCE(offer_stats.canceled_offer_count, 0) AS canceled_offer_count, COALESCE(attachment_stats.attachment_count, 0) AS attachment_count, 0 AS report_count, 0 AS sanction_count, memo_stats.admin_memo, job_stats.latest_job_created_at, application_stats.latest_application_at, offer_stats.latest_offer_created_at FROM users u LEFT JOIN company_profiles cp ON cp.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN files f ON f.id = cp.logo_file_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ull.user_id, MAX(ull.created_at) AS recent_login_at FROM user_login_logs ull WHERE ull.success = TRUE GROUP BY ull.user_id ) login_stats ON login_stats.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT jp.company_profile_id, COUNT(*)::INT AS job_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE jp.status = 'OPEN')::INT AS open_job_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE jp.status = 'CLOSED')::INT AS closed_job_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE jp.status = 'HIDDEN')::INT AS hidden_job_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE jp.status = 'DRAFT')::INT AS draft_job_count, MAX(jp.created_at) AS latest_job_created_at FROM job_posts jp WHERE jp.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY jp.company_profile_id ) job_stats ON job_stats.company_profile_id = cp.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT jp.company_profile_id, COUNT(*)::INT AS applicant_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ja.status = 'APPLIED')::INT AS unread_applicant_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ja.status IN ('APPLIED', 'REVIEWING', 'INTERVIEW'))::INT AS progressing_application_count, MAX(ja.applied_at) AS latest_application_at FROM job_applications ja JOIN job_posts jp ON jp.id = ja.job_post_id WHERE jp.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY jp.company_profile_id ) application_stats ON application_stats.company_profile_id = cp.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT po.company_profile_id, COUNT(*)::INT AS offer_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE po.status = 'ACCEPTED')::INT AS accepted_offer_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE po.status = 'DECLINED')::INT AS declined_offer_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE po.status = 'SENT')::INT AS pending_offer_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE po.status = 'CANCELED')::INT AS canceled_offer_count, MAX(po.created_at) AS latest_offer_created_at FROM position_offers po GROUP BY po.company_profile_id ) offer_stats ON offer_stats.company_profile_id = cp.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT jp.company_profile_id, COUNT(jpa.id)::INT AS attachment_count FROM job_posts jp JOIN job_post_attachments jpa ON jpa.job_post_id = jp.id WHERE jp.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY jp.company_profile_id ) attachment_stats ON attachment_stats.company_profile_id = cp.id LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT aum.content AS admin_memo FROM admin_user_memos aum WHERE aum.user_id = u.id ORDER BY aum.created_at DESC, aum.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) memo_stats ON TRUE WHERE u.id = #{id} AND u.role = 'COMPANY' AND u.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users ( email, password_hash, name, phone, role ) VALUES ( #{email}, #{passwordHash}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{role} )

INSERT INTO users ( email, name, role, oauth_provider, oauth_id, profile_image_file_id, profile_image_url, language ) VALUES ( #{email}, #{name}, #{role}, #{oauthProvider}, #{oauthId}, #{profileImageFileId}, #{profileImageUrl}, #{language} )
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET oauth_provider = #{oauthProvider}, oauth_id = #{oauthId}, profile_image_file_id = #{profileImageFileId}, profile_image_url = #{profileImageUrl}, language = COALESCE(#{language}, language), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE users SET name = #{name}, phone = #{phone}, profile_image_file_id = #{profileImageFileId}, profile_image_url = #{profileImageUrl}, language = COALESCE(#{language}, language, 'KO'), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE users SET name = #{name}, role = 'PERSONAL', oauth_provider = #{oauthProvider}, oauth_id = #{oauthId}, profile_image_file_id = #{profileImageFileId}, profile_image_url = #{profileImageUrl}, language = COALESCE(#{language}, language, 'KO'), status = 'ACTIVE', deleted_at = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET status = 'DELETED', deleted_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
